title.zh: 11 发布说明与变更日志生成

observation.zh: 读取 18 个提交，过滤 4 个维护提交
observation.en: Read 18 commits and filtered four maintenance commits

observation.zh: 每条均有提交或 Issue 对应
observation.en: Every item maps to a commit or issue

observation.zh: 保留风险、迁移和排障线索
observation.en: Keeps risk, migration, and troubleshooting cues

zh: 人工核对 release-notes.md 中每条是否能回到提交或 Issue。
en: Manually verify each release-notes.md item maps back to a commit or issue.

zh: 用户版不暴露内部工单号。
风险项先给维护者看，不直接写进公告。
发布日期和影响范围必须人工确认。
en: The user-facing version does not expose internal ticket IDs.
Risk items go to maintainers first, not directly into announcements.
Release date and impact scope require human confirmation.

trigger.zh: 版本发布前需要从提交和工单整理发布说明，同时区分用户可见变化和内部变更。
trigger.en: Before release, commits and tickets needed release notes that separate user-visible changes from internal changes.

firstSignal.zh: 原始提交里混有重构、修复和文案调整，不能直接贴给用户。
firstSignal.en: Raw commits mixed refactors, fixes, and copy edits, so they could not be pasted to users.

doneSignal.zh: 输出用户版、内部版和待确认清单三份内容。
doneSignal.en: The output included user-facing notes, internal notes, and a confirmation list.
